description: Produces a construction traffic management plan for a named site — vehicle and pedestrian routing, segregation, loading/delivery and reversing controls, and the site-access and public-interface arrangements. Use this skill whenever a user asks to write or review a traffic management plan, a TMP, a site traffic plan, vehicle-pedestrian segregation, or construction logistics/access controls for a specific site. It separates people from vehicles by design (one-way systems, segregated routes, eliminating reversing), controls deliveries and the public interface, sets speed and signage rules, and applies the hierarchy of controls — emitting a branded report. Grounded in CDM 2015 Regulation 27 and Schedule 3. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: traffic-management-plan
